The '''Ord Mantell Fighter Wing''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fighter wing assigned to protect [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. Consisting of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]], the wing was based in a space defense base on the world's southern hemisphere. The fighter wing and its attached support personnel were a key component in the New Republic defense of the surrounding sector.

*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''
